# Pull Request Template

## 📖 Description of Changes

_Shortly describe what has been implemented in this PR._
Example:

- Added password validation during registration

---

## 🔗 Related Issues

_Specify the issue or task number related to this PR._
Example: `RSS-REST-1_05`

---

## ✅ What Has Been Done

- [ ] New feature / component
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactoring
- [ ] Tests / coverage
- [ ] Other

---

## ⚠️ Points to Pay Attention To

_Specifics, questions, or limitations to pay attention to during review._

---

## 🔗 Related Pull Requests

_If there are dependent PRs — add links here._

---

## 🖼️ Screenshot (if necessary)

_Place here a screenshot or GIF to demonstrate the change (only if UI was updated)._

---

## 🚨 Penalties Checklist

📌 _Before submitting PR, I verified that none of the following problems are present._

- [ ] `@ts-ignore` is present
- [ ] Duplicated code / commented-out code
- [ ] Errors or warnings in console
- [ ] `console.log` left in code
- [ ] HTTP errors not shown in response section
- [ ] Missing linter
- [ ] Missing formatter
- [ ] Missing Husky hooks
